title: leuconymphaea tetragona
intro: Leuconymphaea tetragona, also known as the razor strop fungus or horse mushroom, is a type of edible fungi belonging to the genus Leucogyrophora. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Leuconymphaea tetragona include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Leuconymphaea tetragona can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried powder, tincture, and tea, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
